heading: Notice of injury or death
label: 8119 Notice of injury or death
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large(a).5 U.S.C. 765, .Sept. 7, 1916, ch. 458, § 1539 Stat. 746.5 U.S.C. 766, .Sept. 7, 1916, ch. 458, § 1639 Stat. 746(b).5 U.S.C. 767, .Sept. 7, 1916, ch. 458, § 1739 Stat. 746Subsection (b)(2) is added on authority of former section 770, which is carried into section 8122, to complete the coverage of this section.Administration of this subchapter was transferred to the Secretary of Labor by section 1 of 1950 Reorg. Plan No. 19, (see section 8145).64 Stat. 1271Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

Amendments1974— substituted “or death” for “; failure to give” in section catchline, struck out designation of subsec. (a), redesignated cls. (1) to (7) as (a) to (g), and, as so redesignated, inserted provisions relating to notice of death and substituted “30 days” for “48 hours” in cl. (a), and struck out subsec. (b) relating to allowance of compensation.Pub. L. 93–416

(1) to (7) as (a) to (g), and, as so redesignated, inserted provisions relating to notice of death and substituted “30 days” for “48 hours” in cl. (a), and struck out subsec. (b) relating to allowance of compensation.Pub. L. 93–416

Effective Date of 1974 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable to any injury or death occurring on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–416section 28(a) of Pub. L. 93–416section 8101 of this titleSept. 7, 1974Sept. 7, 1974

children.label: a
children.text: be given within 30 days after the injury or death;

children.label: b
children.text: be given to the immediate superior of the employee by personal delivery or by depositing it in the mail properly stamped and addressed;

children.label: d
children.text: state the name and address of the employee;

children.label: e
children.text: state the year, month, day, and hour when and the particular locality where the injury or death occurred;

children.label: f
children.text: state the cause and nature of the injury, or, in the case of death, the employment factors believed to be the cause; and

children.label: g
children.text: be signed by and contain the address of the individual giving the notice.
